content: there is a bug where your cards dont get the blue outline but replays arent 1-1 with time, so just because the replay was that short doesnt mean the actual game was similary that short. You probably just didnt know it was your turn since the cards didnt have the blue outline which happens
Precisely for that reason I have provided a sample of how a normal match should look like. I will provide 4 more slightly different sample matches with one of them being afk loss just for you mate ♥️
Or would you like to see 10 more to be convinced?

Regarding how short the game was: I knew that just my testimony wasn't enough so I recorded the replay. I knew the replay wasn't enough either so I recorded a replay of a normal match. Didn't know that wasn't enough either. I guess I really have to provide more samples
